response.justification: Bogdan brings 10+ years of genuine full-stack experience with a strong TypeScript and Node.js track record across multiple production environments, solid cloud and containerization exposure (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq that directly maps to the role's AI agent requirement. The primary gaps are the absence of Nest.js and Vitest in the resume, no mention of Kotlin, and Python missing from the skills list, but the engineering breadth, TDD culture, and open-source contributions suggest these could be bridged quickly.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js production experience across multiple companies including Optilyz (AWS CDK, MongoDB, React) and RIDE Capital
Directly relevant AI agent and MCP framework development at re:cinq, matching the job's AI agent development requirement
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored open-source D testing libraries, ran TDD/refactoring workshops — signals quality-oriented engineering mindset
concerns: Nest.js is the primary backend framework in the job spec but is not mentioned anywhere in the resume
Kotlin (secondary stack requirement) and Python (listed as required language) are absent from both employment history and skills
Currently in a career gap since October 2025 following a short 6-month stint at re:cinq, which warrants clarification on circumstances
